title: Herbal Greek Veal Stir-fry
description: A light and kid-friendly greek dish featuring veal with a tadka (Indian seasoning blend) for added flavor. Perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: vegan mince meat substitute
ingredients.notes: Can be found in most supermarkets

instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic, onion, and diced red bell pepper to the pan.
Stir-fry for about 5 minutes until vegetables start to soften. Remove from heat and set aside.
In a separate bowl, mix together Greek yogurt and minced garlic in a blender or food processor.
Add sliced zucchini into the same skillet where you had cooked vegetables. Add a bit of water (about 1/4 cup) for steaming if needed. Stir-fry until tender-crisp, about 5 minutes.
Return vegetables to the bowl with yogurt mixture and add sliced capsicum. Mix well and set aside in a warm place.
In the same skillet, lightly fry minced vegan mince meat substitute till cooked through (approximately 8-10 minutes), breaking it into small pieces as you stir-fry.
Add tadka seasoning blend to the skillet and stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant. Pour in the yogurt mixture with zucchini and vegetables, stirring well.
Season with salt and pepper according to taste. Serve hot garnished with chopped cilantro.
Garnish each serving with fresh cilantro leaves before serving.
